title: Irresistible Jamaican Milk Toast
description: A flexitarian-friendly Jamaican dish featuring whole milk and toast, perfect for midnight cravings. This fresh and shaggy dish is cooked on a tava griddle.
instructions: Preheat the tava griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the milk, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt until the sugar is dissolved.
Dip each slice of bread into the milk mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated bread slices on the preheated tava griddle and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Brush the melted butter on top of the toast slices during the last minute of cooking.
In a small bowl, beat the eggs and set aside.
Once the toast is cooked, place it on a serving plate and brush with the beaten eggs.
Serve the Jamaican milk toast warm and enjoy.
